note: Project-level TODOs for the Branson 2026 vault. Human-triaged only. Machine-generated task progress lives elsewhere (not here).

todos.title: Find actual show durations
todos.description: Many shows have a placeholder duration_hours of 2. Get real durations from each theater's official site or box office. Accurate durations improve tag quality (under-1hr vs 1-2hr vs 2-3hr vs half-day) and enable accurate schedule planning for the family.
action_items: Audit data/attractions.json for entries where duration_hours is generic (2.0, 2.5)
For each show/attraction, check the official theater page for stated runtime
Distinguish runtime (show length) vs total experience (runtime + intermission + dinner)
Update duration_hours with the total family-experience time
Once durations are accurate, re-run scripts/classify_tags.py to improve duration-bucket tags

todos.title: Two attractions have wrong thumbnail images (pre-existing data rot)
todos.description: During 2026-04-21 orphan-thumbnail cleanup, visual verification revealed that the 'clean-named' thumbnail on disk is for the wrong show for two attractions. The corrupt-named duplicates (now quarantined at .backups/2026-04-21-phase1b-orphan-thumbs/) were actually the correct ones.
action_items: Hamners' All American New Year's Eve Celebration: web/assets/thumbs/hamners-all-american-new-year-s-eve-celebration-thumb.jpg is the Hamners' Unbelievable Variety image, NOT the NYE image. The correct NYE image is in .backups/2026-04-21-phase1b-orphan-thumbs/hamnersand8217-all-american-new-yearand8217-s-eve-celebration-thumb.jpg. Swap them.

George Jones, Haggard & Friends: web/assets/thumbs/george-jones-haggard-friends-thumb.jpg is a George Strait tribute image, NOT Jones/Haggard. The correct Jones/Haggard image is in .backups/2026-04-21-phase1b-orphan-thumbs/george-jones-haggard-and038-friends-thumb.jpg. Verify and swap.
After swap, delete the wrong-show duplicates from quarantine.

todos.title: Review 34 quarantined orphan thumbnails for permanent deletion
todos.description: On 2026-04-21 we quarantined 34 thumbnails with corrupt names (and8217, and8211, and038 HTML-entity leaks) into .backups/2026-04-21-phase1b-orphan-thumbs/. 11 were byte-identical duplicates of clean-named thumbs already in use. 23 were orphans not referenced by any attraction in attractions.json (likely from deleted/blacklisted shows). After 30 days of no issues surfacing in the dashboard, the quarantine folder can be deleted permanently.
action_items: Confirm dashboard renders correctly with no missing-image 404s (check console in dev tools)
Confirm no user reports of missing thumbnails
Keep .backups/2026-04-21-phase1-pre/ longer (that's the bigger safety net)
